show.title: Ports
show.description: The ports allows you to expose your application to the internet
show.alertRedeploy: Please remember to click Redeploy after adding, editing, or deleting the ports to apply the changes.
show.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this port?

form.title: Ports
form.description: Ports are used to expose your application to the internet.
form.placeholderPublishMode: Select a publish mode for the port
form.hostModeWarning: Host Mode Limitation: When using Host publish mode, Docker Swarm has limitations that prevent proper container updates during deployments. Old containers may not be replaced automatically. Consider using Ingress mode instead, or be prepared to manually stop/start the application after deployments.
